exports.name: createRenderFunction
exports.signature: function createRenderFunction<Plugins extends Plugin[]>(plugins?: Plugins): <Data>(params: RenderParams<Data, Plugins>) => string
exports.description: Creates a render function that generates a complete HTML page string. Accepts an optional array of plugins to extend rendering behavior. Returns a typed render function that accepts RenderParams and returns an HTML string.

parameters.name: plugins
parameters.description: Optional array of plugins to extend the render function.

exports.name: generateRenderContent
exports.signature: function generateRenderContent<Plugins extends Plugin[], Data>(plugins: Plugins | undefined, params: RenderParams<Data, Plugins>): RenderContent
exports.description: Generates the content to be rendered in an HTML page. Applies all plugins to build the RenderContent object that can be used with renderHeadContent and renderBodyContent for streaming or custom rendering.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: An object containing various parameters for rendering the content.

exports.name: renderHeadContent
exports.signature: function renderHeadContent(content: HeadContent): string
exports.description: Renders the HTML head section content (title, meta tags, link tags, stylesheets, inline styles, scripts, inline scripts) from a HeadContent object. Used for streaming or custom HTML assembly.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The head content object produced by generateRenderContent.

exports.name: renderBodyContent
exports.signature: function renderBodyContent(content: BodyContent): string
exports.description: Renders the HTML body content (beforeRoot, root div, afterRoot) from a BodyContent object. Used for streaming or custom HTML assembly.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The body content object produced by generateRenderContent.

exports.name: createGoogleAnalyticsPlugin
exports.signature: function createGoogleAnalyticsPlugin(): Plugin<GoogleAnalyticsPluginOptions, 'googleAnalytics'>
exports.description: Creates a plugin that adds a Google Analytics counter (gtag.js) to the page body. Plugin name is 'googleAnalytics'. Requires counter.id to be specified in pluginsOptions.googleAnalytics.

exports.name: createYandexMetrikaPlugin
exports.signature: function createYandexMetrikaPlugin(): Plugin<MetrikaPluginOptions, 'yandexMetrika'>
exports.description: Creates a plugin that adds Yandex Metrika counters to the page body. Plugin name is 'yandexMetrika'. Supports single or multiple counters via pluginsOptions.yandexMetrika.counter.

exports.name: createLayoutPlugin
exports.signature: function createLayoutPlugin(options: LayoutInitOptions): Plugin<LayoutPluginOptions, 'layout'>
exports.description: Creates a plugin that injects scripts and stylesheets from a webpack assets manifest file. Plugin name is 'layout'. Supports both entrypoints-based manifests and flat key-value manifests. Sets window.__PUBLIC_PATH__ inline script.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Init options including manifest path/object/function and optional publicPath (default '/build/').

exports.name: createUikitPlugin
exports.signature: function createUikitPlugin(): Plugin<UikitPluginOptions, 'uikit'>
exports.description: Creates a plugin that adds @gravity-ui/uikit body attributes (g-root theme class and optional dir attribute for RTL support). Plugin name is 'uikit'.

exports.name: createRemoteVersionsPlugin
exports.signature: function createRemoteVersionsPlugin(): Plugin<RemoteVersionsPluginOptions, 'remoteVersions'>
exports.description: Creates a plugin that adds microfrontend version information to the page by setting window.__REMOTE_VERSIONS__ as an inline script. Plugin name is 'remoteVersions'. Used with module federation / microfrontend architectures.

exports.name: createDefaultPlugins
exports.signature: function createDefaultPlugins(options: {layout: LayoutInitOptions}): Plugin[]
exports.description: Helper that creates all built-in plugins (googleAnalytics, yandexMetrika, uikit, layout) pre-configured and ready to pass to createRenderFunction.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Object with a layout property containing LayoutInitOptions for the layout plugin.

exports.name: Plugin
exports.signature: interface Plugin<Options = any, Name extends string = string>
exports.description: Interface describing a render plugin. Has a name identifier and an apply method called during rendering. The apply method receives options (from pluginsOptions), renderContent (mutable), commonOptions, and the deprecated utils (use renderContent.helpers instead).

exports.name: RenderParams
exports.signature: interface RenderParams<Data, Plugins extends Plugin[] = []> extends CommonOptions
exports.description: Parameters passed to the render function returned by createRenderFunction. Extends CommonOptions (title, lang, isMobile). Includes data (set to window.__DATA__), icon (favicon), nonce, htmlAttributes, meta, links, scripts, styleSheets, inlineScripts, inlineStyleSheets, bodyContent, and pluginsOptions.

exports.name: RenderFunction
exports.signature: type RenderFunction<Plugins extends Plugin[] = []> = <Data>(params: RenderParams<Data, Plugins>) => string
exports.description: Type alias for the render function returned by createRenderFunction.

exports.name: RenderHelpers
exports.signature: interface RenderHelpers
exports.description: Helper utilities available on renderContent.helpers within plugins and the alternative rendering API. Provides renderScript, renderInlineScript, renderStyle, renderInlineStyle, renderMeta, renderLink, and attrs methods for generating HTML tag strings.

exports.name: Icon
exports.signature: interface Icon { type?: string; sizes?: string; href?: string; }
exports.description: Describes the page favicon. Default: { type: 'image/png', sizes: '16x16', href: '/favicon.png' }.

exports.name: Link
exports.signature: interface Link { as?: string; href: string; rel?: string; type?: string; sizes?: string; title?: HTMLLinkElement['title']; crossOrigin?: '' | 'anonymous' | 'use-credentials'; hreflang?: HTMLLinkElement['hreflang']; }
exports.description: Describes an HTML link tag (e.g. preload, font, manifest).

exports.name: Script
exports.signature: interface Script { src: string; defer?: boolean; async?: boolean; crossOrigin?: '' | 'anonymous' | 'use-credentials'; type?: 'importmap' | 'module' | (string & {}); }
exports.description: Describes a script tag. Each script also generates a preload link tag.

exports.name: Stylesheet
exports.signature: interface Stylesheet { href: string; crossOrigin?: '' | 'anonymous' | 'use-credentials'; }
exports.description: Describes a stylesheet link tag.

exports.name: Meta
exports.signature: type Meta = { name: string; content: string }
exports.description: Describes an HTML meta tag with name and content attributes.

exports.name: GoogleAnalyticsCounter
exports.signature: interface GoogleAnalyticsCounter { id: string; }
exports.description: Google Analytics counter configuration. The id is the GA measurement ID.

exports.name: GoogleAnalyticsPluginOptions
exports.signature: interface GoogleAnalyticsPluginOptions { useBeaconTransport?: boolean; counter: GoogleAnalyticsCounter; defaultConsent?: { adStorage?: 'denied' | 'granted'; analyticsStorage?: 'denied' | 'granted'; waitForUpdate?: number; }; }
exports.description: Options for the googleAnalytics plugin passed via pluginsOptions.googleAnalytics. useBeaconTransport enables navigator.sendBeacon. defaultConsent configures gtag consent defaults.

exports.name: MetrikaCounter
exports.signature: interface MetrikaCounter { id: number; defer?: boolean; clickmap?: boolean; trackLinks?: boolean; accurateTrackBounce?: boolean | number; webvisor?: boolean; sendTitle?: boolean; nonce?: string; encryptedExperiments?: string; triggerEvent?: boolean; trackHash?: boolean; ecommerce?: boolean | string; type?: number; userParams?: UserParams; }
exports.description: Yandex Metrika counter configuration. Defaults: defer=false, clickmap=true, trackLinks=true, accurateTrackBounce=true, webvisor=false, sendTitle=true, triggerEvent=false, trackHash=false, ecommerce=false, type=0.

exports.name: MetrikaPluginOptions
exports.signature: type MetrikaPluginOptions = { src?: string; counter: MetrikaCounter | MetrikaCounter[]; }
exports.description: Options for the yandexMetrika plugin passed via pluginsOptions.yandexMetrika. src overrides the metrika script URL (default: https://mc.yandex.ru/metrika/tag.js). counter accepts a single counter config or array.

exports.name: UserParams
exports.signature: type UserParams = { [x: string]: boolean | string | number | null | UserParams }
exports.description: Recursive type for Yandex Metrika user parameters passed to counter init.

exports.name: LayoutInitOptions
exports.signature: interface LayoutInitOptions { publicPath?: string; manifest: string | Manifest | ((commonOptions: CommonOptions) => string | Manifest); }
exports.description: Initialization options for createLayoutPlugin. manifest can be a file path string, a Manifest object, or a function returning either. publicPath defaults to '/build/'.

exports.name: LayoutPluginOptions
exports.signature: interface LayoutPluginOptions { name: string; prefix?: string; scriptsCrossOrigin?: '' | 'anonymous' | 'use-credentials'; stylesCrossOrigin?: '' | 'anonymous' | 'use-credentials'; }
exports.description: Per-request options for the layout plugin passed via pluginsOptions.layout. name is the webpack entrypoint name. prefix is an optional URL prefix.

exports.name: Manifest
exports.signature: type Manifest = Record<string, string> & { entrypoints?: Record<string, EntrypointAssets> }
exports.description: Webpack assets manifest shape. Supports both flat key-value format and entrypoints format with js/css asset arrays.

exports.name: UikitPluginOptions
exports.signature: interface UikitPluginOptions { theme: string; direction?: 'ltr' | 'rtl'; }
exports.description: Options for the uikit plugin passed via pluginsOptions.uikit. theme sets the g-root theme class (e.g. 'dark', 'light'). direction sets the body dir attribute for RTL support.

exports.name: RemoteVersionsPluginOptions
exports.signature: type RemoteVersionsPluginOptions = Record<string, string>
exports.description: Options for the remoteVersions plugin passed via pluginsOptions.remoteVersions. A map of remote name to version string. Sets window.__REMOTE_VERSIONS__ on the page.
